_comment: Issue #1027 regression demo: a lone Infantry block is marched forward, then reversed twice in a row (up, then back down). The SECOND reversal used to collapse the block into a blob and re-expand over hundreds of ticks (the reported pulsing); with the fix each about-face turns in good order and the ranks hold their spacing. Drill mode, no enemy, so nothing but the two reversals is on screen.
